{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929","id":"msg_01LvEZo4WezXDSGbVe784AbU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"I need to calculate 143 × 27.\n\nLet me break this down:\n143 × 27 = 143 × (20 + 7)\n         = 143 × 20 + 143 × 7\n         = 2860 + 1001\n         = 3861\n\nLet me verify this another way:\n143 × 27\n= (140 + 3) × 27\n= 140 × 27 + 3 × 27\n= 140 × 27 + 81\n\n140 × 27 = 140 × (30 - 3)\n         = 140 × 30 - 140 × 3\n         = 4200 - 420\n         = 3780\n\nSo: 3780 + 81 = 3861\n\nLet me verify once more using standard multiplication:\n    143\n  ×  27\n  -----\n   1001  (143 × 7)\n  2860   (143 × 20)\n  -----\n  3861\n\nYes, 143 × 27 = 3861","signature":""},{"type":"text","text":"143 × 27 = 3,861\n\nTo break this down:\n- 143 × 20 = 2,860\n- 143 × 7 = 1,001\n- 2,860 + 1,001 = 3,861"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":48,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":335,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"}}
